{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Heartbeat Star
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Heartbeat Star]] is a stellar landmark containing a sleeping [[dragon]] at its core.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
